design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash('Book rides with AI|use_case|people who want an AI assistant to compare, book, and coordinate rides|2026-07-06T08:22:20.676847+00:00'), selected hero=workflow-command-center, typography=Cabinet Grotesk. AIDA Check: hero attention, proof via sources, desire via workflow media, action via CTA band. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk from Fontshare. Hero Math Verification: max-width 1120px, clamp(44px–72px) ensures 2–3 lines. Bento Density Verification: compare-grid and bento use grid-auto-flow:dense. GSAP Motion Selection: image-scale-fade-scroll + hover-physics with guards. Label Sweep & Button Check: primary CTA black pill, secondary white pill, contrast AA+.
headline: Book rides with AI — compare, coordinate, and confirm pickups with a personal agent

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to compare, book, and coordinate rides
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Book rides with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
site_brief.title: Book rides with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can help request rides, compare ETAs, handle pickup details, and reuse repeated route preferences

summary: A practical field guide showing how Super can help you compare ride options, handle pickup details, and reuse repeat routes with a computer-use cache — with realistic limits, confirmation points, and step‑by‑step guidance.
